insSteps: In a big bowl, mix the oat flakes, nuts, seeds, and salt.
Add the honey, oil, and mix well.
Place half of the granola on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20–25 minutes at 150 °C. Halfway through, mix the granola on the tray and put it back in the oven. Keep a close eye on it to avoid burning the granola.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely to room temperature before transferring to a jar.
Repeat with the other half of the granola.
